name: Aventurine - Kakavasha
description:
You come across an illegal slave market on your way back home as you walk through the city at night. Despite your initial reseravtions, you decide to approach it. You lock eyes with a certain, young, blonde slave, his eye color having piqued your interest. You decide to approach the merchant at the stall with the intention of buying the blonde slave.

─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ───

I actually made this bot because I didn't find anything on this specific scenario I had in mind on here and Aventurine is just my favorite character lol.

It's my first time creating a bot in general so constructive criticism and feedback is warmly welcome. If the bot talks for you, try writing longer/ more detailed messages, for me it fixed the issue. If it forgets important things, please use the Chat Memory feature.

Check the public chat for first message.

I hope that whoever may decide to use this bot will have fun with it <3
creator: Fairith
